steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which season had the lowest walnut price according to the graph. Walnuts are represented by the light gray bars. Compare the height of the walnut bar across all four seasons.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 2017/18 season: The walnut bar for this season is taller than 2018/19 — not the lowest. ✗
  • Choice B — 2016/17 season: The walnut bar for this season is taller than 2018/19 — not the lowest. ✗
  • Choice C — 2018/19 season: The walnut bar is the shortest of the four seasons, reaching roughly \$0.40 per pound. ✓
  • Choice D — 2019/20 season: The walnut bar for this season is taller than 2018/19 — not the lowest. ✗
That is the correct answer.
